notes:
🚀 v35.1 - OBD Stability & Hardening (v48)

✅ FIXED: ECU lockup after deep scans (auto-reset to default session 10 01).
✅ FIXED: Stale response overlap (flushing window after timeouts).
✅ FIXED: Race conditions with multiple scans (UI locking during scan).
✅ NEW: 'Safe Mode' toggle for lower-quality ELM327 adapters (extra latency).
✅ NEW: Automated engine state logging (Ignition/RPM detection).
✅ NEW: SSE unmatched sensor mapping (GPS Fix, Modem State, Last Error).
